name: brighthire
description: Connect Codex to BrightHire interview intelligence data through the BrightHire app connector.

interface.shortDescription: Search and analyze BrightHire interviews, candidates, calls, and hiring data.
interface.longDescription: Use BrightHire from Codex to retrieve interview intelligence context, inspect calls and candidates, and support hiring workflows with governed access to BrightHire data.
defaultPrompt: Use BrightHire to find recent interviews for this candidate.
Search BrightHire for calls related to this role.
Summarize the BrightHire interview context for this hiring decision.
